final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster — a 3×3 nine-grid vertical layout designed for Chinese social media platform 小红书 (Xiaohongshu), formatted at 3:4 aspect ratio so the full image can be sliced into 9 equal square cards for sequential posting.

Style/medium: clean editorial infographic poster, ins-style healing aesthetic, light skeuomorphic illustration accents, magazine-grade layout, warm minimalist design language suited to female wellness lifestyle content
Composition: strict 3-column × 3-row grid, each cell clearly separated by thin visible borders or consistent gutters, all content centered within each cell, no text or illustration bleeding across grid lines; every cell reads as a self-contained 小红书 card
Subject: nine individual sleep-tip cards unified by a single visual system — soft bed linens, moon, pillow, eye mask, warm milk, aromatherapy candle, book, curtains, clock, notebook, pen, desk lamp, thermometer, shower steam, towel, breathing lines, sleeping figure, stars, phone, coffee cup with a "no" symbol, bedside lamp, warm light
Scene/backdrop: each cell has a clean cream or oat-white background with gentle warm shadow or subtle texture; no busy patterns; generous breathing room around text and illustration
Lighting/mood: soft, warm, healing — like early-evening candlelight; no harsh shadows; gentle and intimate
Color palette: primary tones are creamy white (#FAF7F2), light beige, pale oat, and soft caramel; deep brown (#3E2A1E) for all body text and titles; small accent touches of warm blush or sage; palette is gentle and cohesive across all nine cells
Materials/textures: light linen-like paper texture on backgrounds; soft watercolor-style illustration fills; clean sans-serif Chinese typeface, large and legible
Text (verbatim): 第1格 — 大标题「让你倒头就睡的8个 tips」，副标题「失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏」；第2格 — 标题「1. 睡前1小时别玩手机」，正文「蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。」；第3格 — 标题「2. 睡前把灯光调暗」，正文「暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。」；第4格 — 标题「3. 房间温度别太高」，正文「稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。」；第5格 — 标题「4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡」，正文「咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。」；第6格 — 标题「5. 睡前洗个热水澡」，正文「能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。」；第7格 — 标题「6. 脑子停不下来就写下来」，正文「把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。」；第8格 — 标题「7. 固定上床时间」，正文「每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。」；第9格 — 标题「8. 试试深呼吸放松法」，正文「吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。」，底部小字「收藏这组，今晚试试看」
Constraints: all text must be Chinese characters only — no English, no garbled characters; font must be large, clean, and highly legible; grid lines or gutters must be clearly visible to allow clean post-production slicing; each cell must be visually complete and independently readable; no text placed near grid boundaries; layout must feel like a polished new-media design, not a cheap promotional flyer
Avoid: English text anywhere in the image; garbled or illegible characters; text overlapping grid dividers; overly decorative or cluttered backgrounds; neon or cool-toned colors; heavy drop shadows; stock-photo collage feel; excessive marketing sticker elements; gradient overuse
